skills.description: Move all joints to the known safe home configuration (all joints at 90° except gripper at 65°).
Set a single joint to a target angle in degrees (0=min, 180=max). Joint 0 base yaw, 1 shoulder, 2 elbow, 3 wrist, 4 gripper. Joint 4 (gripper) is internally clamped to 30-100°.
Perform a gentle waving motion using the shoulder joint. The repetitions argument is required and controls how many full back-and-forth swings to perform.
Open the end effector gripper fully.
Close the end effector gripper to grip an object. Higher force_pct means a tighter grip.
Rotate the base joint to the left by a given number of degrees from the current pose.
Rotate the base joint to the right by a given number of degrees from the current pose.
Tilt the arm upward by raising the shoulder joint by a given number of degrees from the current pose.
Tilt the arm downward by lowering the shoulder joint by a given number of degrees from the current pose.
Display short text on the arm's OLED screen (max 20 characters; longer strings are truncated).
